summary: Comprehensive OLAP Assistant testing completed. All backend APIs (15/15 tests passed) and frontend features working correctly. Previous chat response display issue has been FIXED.

issues: Console warning about chart width/height being -1 during initial render - cosmetic issue, charts render correctly after data loads
Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent components - accessibility warning, not blocking functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Add aria-describedby to Dialog components for better accessibility
Minor: Add minWidth/minHeight to chart containers to prevent console warnings
seed_data_creation: DuckDB star schema auto-generates 11,000+ sales records on startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified working: Backend APIs (health, data summary, OLAP queries, chat, agents, dimensions, KPI), Frontend (dashboard metrics, chat with LLM responses, all 5 dialogs, chart type switching, table view, dark/light mode). Previous iteration 5 reported chat response display issue - this has been FIXED and chat now displays both user messages and assistant responses with analysis results.

backend: GET /api/ - Health check returns correct message
GET /api/olap/sales-by-region - Returns 5 regions with sales breakdown
GET /api/olap/sales-by-product - Returns 8 products with sales data
POST /api/chat - Processes natural language queries with LLM
POST /api/chat with session_id - Maintains session context
POST /api/olap/query with filters - Filters applied correctly
frontend: Dashboard loads with 4 metric cards (11,000 records, $224.6M sales, 279,707 units, $20,414 avg)
Chat input accepts queries and sends to backend
Chat displays user messages and assistant responses
Analysis results show with dimensions, filters, and data
Table view shows data with columns
Filter Builder dialog opens and allows adding filters
OLAP Guide dialog shows all 5 operations (Drill-Down, Roll-Up, Slice, Dice, Pivot)
